news.title: AcelaMicro Launches New High-Speed ADC Family for Industrial Applications
news.summary: AcelaMicro introduces the ACM1600 series of high-speed SAR ADCs, offering up to 2 MSPS sampling rates with 16-bit resolution for demanding industrial applications.
news.content:
Suzhou, China - AcelaMicro (Suzhou) Co., Ltd., a leading provider of high-performance analog and mixed-signal ICs, today announced the launch of the ACM1600 series, a new family of high-speed successive approximation register (SAR) analog-to-digital converters (ADCs) designed for industrial automation, motor control, and power monitoring applications.

The ACM1600 series delivers exceptional performance with sampling rates up to 2 MSPS and 16-bit resolution, enabling precise real-time monitoring in demanding industrial environments. Key features include:

- 16-bit resolution with no missing codes
- Up to 2 MSPS sampling rate
- Integrated programmable gain amplifier (1x, 2x, 4x, 8x)
- Excellent DC accuracy: +/- 1 LSB INL
- Low power consumption: 20 mW at 2 MSPS
- Robust ESD protection: +/- 4kV HBM
- Wide operating temperature range: -40°C to +125°C

The new ADC family is ideal for multi-channel data acquisition systems, motor current sensing, and battery management systems where high speed and precision are critical.

"The ACM1600 series represents a significant advancement in our data converter portfolio," said Dr. Wei Zhang, Vice President of Product Development at AcelaMicro. "We've leveraged our expertise in high-performance analog design to deliver ADCs that meet the demanding requirements of next-generation industrial systems."

The ACM1600 series is available in production quantities now. For more information, visit www.acelamicro.com or contact your local AcelaMicro sales representative.

news.title: AcelaMicro Achieves IATF 16949 Certification for Automotive Quality Management
news.summary: AcelaMicro receives IATF 16949 certification, demonstrating commitment to automotive quality standards and expanding opportunities in the growing electric vehicle market.
news.content:
Suzhou, China - AcelaMicro (Suzhou) Co., Ltd. is pleased to announce that it has achieved IATF 16949:2016 certification for its quality management system. This internationally recognized standard for automotive quality management systems demonstrates AcelaMicro's commitment to meeting the stringent quality requirements of the automotive industry.

The certification covers the design and manufacturing of analog and mixed-signal integrated circuits for automotive applications, including battery management systems, motor control, and sensor interfaces.

"Achieving IATF 16949 certification is a significant milestone for AcelaMicro," said James Li, CEO of AcelaMicro. "The electric vehicle market is experiencing rapid growth, and this certification positions us to serve Tier 1 automotive suppliers and OEMs with the highest quality standards."

AcelaMicro's automotive-grade products are already qualified to AEC-Q100 standards, and the IATF 16949 certification further strengthens the company's automotive capabilities. The certification audit was conducted by a leading third-party certification body and covered all aspects of AcelaMicro's quality management system.

With this certification, AcelaMicro is qualified to supply products for safety-critical automotive applications and can participate in the supply chains of major automotive manufacturers worldwide.

For more information about AcelaMicro's automotive products and capabilities, visit www.acelamicro.com/automotive.

news.title: AcelaMicro Expands Global Distribution Network with New Partnerships
news.summary: AcelaMicro announces new distribution partnerships to expand global reach and provide enhanced technical support for customers worldwide.
news.content:
Suzhou, China - AcelaMicro (Suzhou) Co., Ltd. today announced the expansion of its global distribution network through strategic partnerships with leading electronics distributors. These partnerships will enhance AcelaMicro's ability to serve customers in North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific regions.

The new distribution agreements include:

- LiTong Electronics (Asia-Pacific)
- Future Electronics (North America and Europe)
- Arrow Electronics (Global)

These partnerships provide customers with improved access to AcelaMicro's comprehensive portfolio of analog and mixed-signal ICs, including data converters, power management ICs, and sensor interface solutions.

"Expanding our distribution network is a key part of our growth strategy," said Sarah Chen, Vice President of Sales at AcelaMicro. "Our distribution partners provide not only logistics support but also valuable technical expertise and local customer service."

Customers can now access AcelaMicro products through these authorized distributors, benefiting from:

- Local inventory and shorter lead times
- Technical support and application guidance
- Design resources and evaluation tools
- Flexible logistics and supply chain services

For a complete list of authorized distributors, visit www.acelamicro.com/distributors.

news.title: AcelaMicro Introduces High-Isolation CAN Transceiver for EV Applications
news.summary: New ACM1050 isolated CAN transceiver delivers 5000Vrms isolation and 50 kV/μs CMTI for demanding electric vehicle and industrial applications.
news.content:
Suzhou, China - AcelaMicro (Suzhou) Co., Ltd. today introduced the ACM1050, a high-performance isolated CAN transceiver designed for electric vehicle (EV) battery management systems, motor drives, and industrial automation applications requiring robust isolation.

The ACM1050 features:

- 5000Vrms galvanic isolation
- 50 kV/μs common-mode transient immunity (CMTI)
- Integrated isolated DC-DC converter
- ISO 11898-2 compliant
- Up to 1 Mbps data rate
- Extended temperature range: -40°C to +125°C
- AEC-Q100 Grade 1 qualified

The integrated isolated DC-DC converter eliminates the need for external isolated power supplies, reducing board space and system cost. The high CMTI ensures reliable communication in environments with severe common-mode transients from motor drives and switching power supplies.

"The ACM1050 addresses the critical isolation requirements of modern EV systems," said Dr. Michael Wang, Director of Interface Products at AcelaMicro. "The combination of high isolation, excellent CMTI, and integrated power makes it an ideal solution for battery management and motor control applications."

The ACM1050 is sampling now with production quantities available in Q2 2026. For more information, visit www.acelamicro.com/ACM1050.

news.title: AcelaMicro Opens New Research and Development Center in Shanghai
news.summary: New R&D center strengthens AcelaMicro's innovation capabilities and accelerates development of next-generation analog and mixed-signal solutions.
news.content:
Shanghai, China - AcelaMicro (Suzhou) Co., Ltd. today announced the opening of a new research and development center in Shanghai's Zhangjiang Hi-Tech Park. The new facility will focus on advanced analog and mixed-signal IC design for automotive, industrial, and medical applications.

The Shanghai R&D center represents an investment of $10 million and will employ over 100 engineers at full capacity. The facility includes:

- State-of-the-art IC design labs
- Characterization and test laboratories
- Reliability testing facilities
- Collaboration spaces for customer engagement

"The Shanghai R&D center significantly expands our innovation capabilities," said Dr. Wei Zhang, Vice President of Product Development. "Shanghai's rich talent pool in semiconductor design and proximity to our customers make it an ideal location for this investment."

The new center will focus on developing:

- Next-generation data converters for automotive ADAS
- High-voltage isolation technologies
- Precision sensor interfaces for medical applications
- Power management ICs for electric vehicles

AcelaMicro plans to double its R&D workforce over the next three years, with the Shanghai center playing a key role in this expansion.

For more information about career opportunities at AcelaMicro, visit www.acelamicro.com/careers.
